name: MALLORY-WEISS SYNDROME
definition: mucosal ± submucosal partial thickness tear of distal esophagus ± gastric cardia with
dominant_finding: 1-4 cm longitudinal collection of barium (single tear in 77%, multiple tears in 23%)
discriminating_features: 1-4 cm longitudinal collection of barium (single tear in 77%, multiple tears in 23%)

general: 1-4 cm longitudinal collection of barium (single tear in 77%, multiple tears in 23%)
